---
title: "rnaseq2tracks — Pipeline Report"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
params:
  outdir: ""
  config: ""
  samplesheet: ""
  species: "mouse"
  layout: "PE"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)
library(knitr); library(kableExtra); library(data.table); library(ggplot2)
out <- params$outdir
```

## Run summary

```{r config_tbl}
cfg_vars <- c("SPECIES","GENOME_ASSEMBLY","LIBRARY_LAYOUT","REGULAR_CHROMS_ONLY","CHROMOSOME_NAMING")
cfg_vals <- unlist(lapply(cfg_vars, function(v) {
  tryCatch(readLines(params$config)[grep(paste0("^",v,"="),readLines(params$config))][1], error=function(e) NA)
}))
kable(data.frame(Parameter=cfg_vars, Value=cfg_vals), "html") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","condensed"), full_width=FALSE)
```

## Samplesheet

```{r samplesheet_tbl}
ss <- read.csv(params$samplesheet, comment.char="#")
kable(ss, "html") %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","condensed"))
```

## STAR alignment summary

```{r star_qc}
star_tsv <- file.path(out,"07_qc","star","star_alignment_summary.tsv")
if (file.exists(star_tsv)) {
  dt <- fread(star_tsv, sep="\t")
  kable(dt, "html", digits=2) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","condensed")) %>%
    scroll_box(width="100%")
} else {
  cat("STAR summary not found.")
}
```

## Size factors

```{r sf_tbl}
sf_f <- file.path(out,"analysis","counts","size_factors.tsv")
if (file.exists(sf_f)) {
  dt <- fread(sf_f, sep="\t")
  kable(dt, "html", digits=4) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","condensed"), full_width=FALSE)
} else cat("Size factors not found.")
```

## RSeQC — infer_experiment

```{r infer_exp}
ie_dir <- file.path(out,"07_qc","rseqc","infer_experiment")
if (dir.exists(ie_dir)) {
  files <- list.files(ie_dir, pattern="\\.txt$", full.names=TRUE)
  rows <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    lines <- readLines(f)
    sid   <- sub("_infer_experiment\\.txt","",basename(f))
    fwd   <- as.numeric(gsub(".*: ","",lines[grep("1\\+\\+",lines)[1]]))
    rev_  <- as.numeric(gsub(".*: ","",lines[grep("1\\+\\-",lines)[1]]))
    fail  <- as.numeric(gsub(".*: ","",lines[grep("failed",lines)[1]]))
    data.frame(sample=sid, forward_pct=round(fwd*100,1),
               reverse_pct=round(rev_*100,1), undetermined_pct=round(fail*100,1))
  })
  df <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  kable(df, "html") %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","condensed"))
} else cat("infer_experiment outputs not found.")
```

## Outputs

```{r outputs}
dirs <- c("fastQC","multiQC","STARlogs","07_qc","bams","bedGraph","bigwig","analysis","reports")
exist <- sapply(dirs, function(d) if(dir.exists(file.path(out,d))) "✓" else "—")
kable(data.frame(Directory=dirs, Present=exist), "html") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","condensed"), full_width=FALSE)
```
